introSection: Barnyard Dance is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Bengtson's Pumpkin Farm in Homer Glen, Illinois, USA. It opened on September 22, 2017.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Barnyard Dance was the newest addition to Bengtson's Pumpkin Farm for the 2017 season. The ride opened on September 22, 2017 and was the first roller coaster to be added to the park.

fullText:
Barnyard Dance is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Bengtson's Pumpkin Farm in Homer Glen, Illinois, USA. It opened on September 22, 2017.

Barnyard Dance was the newest addition to Bengtson's Pumpkin Farm for the 2017 season. The ride opened on September 22, 2017 and was the first roller coaster to be added to the park.



Each row sits back-to-back.
